title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HEALTH SHARE OF OREGON HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health-related social needs (HRSN) are basic needs that affect a person's health. These benefits help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. Eligibility: HealthShare members who meet all of the following: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement. If people do not have a written lease or rental agreement, they may fill out a "verification of landlord-tenant relationship," form with their landlord in order to apply. -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm Email (503) 416-4100 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 416-4100 CareOregon Other (971) 236-2998 Application Status Questions FAX (503) 214-8909 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, fax, or visit website for more information; all documents are required in order to be screened FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number -All pages of a rent/lease agreement -Proof of income for all people age 18 and older in the household LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Manufactured/Mobile Home Lot Fee Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION MATERIAL GOODS - CAREOREGON HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - KAISER PERMANENTE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - LEGACY HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - OHSU HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - PROVIDENCE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
